styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.8; color: #333; padding: 20px; background: #fff;
styles.h1: font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #000; margin: 30px 0 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 2px solid #000;
styles.blockquote: margin: 20px 0; padding: 15px 20px; background: #f7f7f7; border-left: 4px solid #ddd; color: #666; font-style: italic;
styles.code: font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; background: #f5f5f5; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; color: #e83e8c; font-size: 14px;
styles.pre: background: #2d2d2d; color: #f8f8f2; padding: 15px; border-radius: 5px; overflow-x: auto; margin: 20px 0;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 20px auto; border-radius: 5px;
styles.th: background: #f0f0f0; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd; font-weight: 600; text-align: left;
